title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The release positions Microsoft as a full-stack AI competitor to OpenAI, with models covering reasoning, agentic behavior, and quantum applications. Microsoft is consolidating control over multiple layers of the AI stack including models, agents, and hardware.
